rationale: The cited paper appears conceptually central rather than incidental: it introduces “shopping momentum” (initial purchase increasing unrelated subsequent purchase via mind-set shift), which aligns closely with the citing paper’s focus on basket-size spillovers and unpromoted purchases. Given this strong construct overlap and plausible mechanism/foundational relevance, and with a verified DOI match (10.1509/jmkr.44.3.370), this pair should be retained for full relation assessment.
